data.title: Western Union plans to launch stablecoin USDPT in May.CEO Devin McGranahan aims to integrate digital assets into money movement services.
data.description: The CEO of Western Union, Devin McGranahan, announced plans to prioritize the expansion of adoption and integration of digital assets into the company's primary money movement platform in the future.

data.title: Apollo Funds to Acquire Forvia’s Automotive Interiors Business
data.description: A deal has been made to create a prominent global automotive interiors supplier as its own entity. This transaction involves significant numbers in terms of revenue and market share. The company aims to become a key player in the industry.

data.title: OSE Immunotherapeutics Welcomes FDA Orphan Drug Designation Granted to Pegrizeprument (VEL-101) for Prevention of Organ Rejection in Heart Transplant Patients
data.description: OSE Immunotherapeutics has received FDA Orphan Drug Designation for their medication Pegrizeprument (VEL-101) to prevent organ rejection following heart transplants. This designation is granted to drugs intended for the treatment of rare diseases affecting fewer than 200,000 people in the U.S. The drug aims to address the acute need for solutions to organ rejection, offering new hope to patients facing this challenge. This designation provides incentives for the development of drugs for rare conditions and highlights the potential impact of Pegrizeprument in the field of heart transplantation.

data.title: Exosens delivers strong Q1 2026 performance, with accelerating defense momentum in digital imaging and night vision; Fully on track to deliver on 2026 guidance
data.description: Exosens reported robust performance in the first quarter of 2026, with a notable increase in defense sector activity focused on digital imaging and night vision technologies. This acceleration in momentum was reflected in the company's financial results, showcasing significant growth and promising prospects for the future.

data.title: Novartis Rhapsido® receives European Commission approval as first oral targeted treatment for chronic spontaneous urticaria
data.description: Novartis reported today that the European Commission has granted approval for Rhapsido ® (remibrutinib) for chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) in adults who have not responded sufficiently to H1-antihistamine therapy. This marks the first time an oral targeted therapy has been greenlit for CSU treatment, providing a novel treatment method. Rhapsido is to be taken twice daily in pill form, with no need for regular lab monitoring.

data.title: SoftBank Corp. and TOPPAN Holdings Develop Lightweight, Durable Skin for Solar HAPS Aircraft Wings
data.description: The potential of skin's resilience to stratospheric conditions, including intense UV radiation and extremely low temperatures, has paved the way for extended High-Altitude Pseudo-Satellite (HAPS) missions. In Tokyo on April 27, 2026, SoftBank Corp. (TYO: 9434) under the leadership of President & CEO Junichi Miyakawa, and TOPPAN Holdings Inc. (TYO: 7911) collaborated on this breakthrough development. This partnership signifies a significant step towards prolonging HAPS operations, enhancing the efficiency and capability of such missions.

data.title: Appcast Releases 2026 U.K. Recruitment Marketing Benchmark Report as Labour Market Softens and Hiring Costs Decline
data.description: In London, the labor market in the U.K. is undergoing a cooling phase, leading to notable impacts on hiring expenses, candidate actions, and job advertisement effectiveness. To assist human resource professionals in adjusting to this environment, Appcast has unveiled its latest study, the 2026 U.K. Recruitment Marketing Benchmark Report. This report is based on the analysis of 3.6 million clicks on recruitment advertisements and 880,000 job applications received by over 190 U.K. employers. It offers valuable data-driven insights and benchmarks for talent acquisition leaders to make informed decisions.
